name: claude-session-guardian
description: Monitor Claude Code's 5-hour and 7-day rate limit windows via background detector + reactor skill. Adaptive polling cadence (5min in quiet zones, down to 1min in red/critical) and event-only notifications (no periodic heartbeats) keep overhead near zero in idle sessions. Auto-detects zone upgrades at thresholds 50/65/75/85. At ≥85%, pauses subagents cooperatively with atomic CronCreate-first sequence. Tracks 7-day window with WEEKLY_WARN at 80% and WEEKLY_CRITICAL at 90% to prevent monthly-limit-hit mid-workflow.
